title: Unable to login to account
description: Customer reports incorrect password error even after resetting password.

title: Payment not processing
description: Credit card payments are failing with a 502 error.

title: App crashing on startup
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after launching on Android 14.

title: Email notifications not received
description: Customer is not receiving any system notification emails.

title: Feature request: Dark Mode
description: Customer requested a dark mode option for better usability.

title: Slow website loading
description: Homepage taking more than 10 seconds to load.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Password reset link expired immediately after receiving.

title: Billing discrepancy
description: Customer was charged twice for the same subscription.

title: Broken download link
description: The installer download link is giving a 404 error.

title: Chat support not available
description: Live chat support option is missing during working hours.
